title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
summary: JavaGuide 是一个全面的 Java 面试与后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发、系统设计及 AI 应用开发等核心领域。项目拥有超过 15.7 万星标，并涉及 agent、AI、context-engineering、deepseek、MCP 等前沿技术，适合准备技术面试和系统学习后端开发与 AI 集成的开发者。
summary_en: JavaGuide is a comprehensive interview guide for Java and backend development, covering computer fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, high concurrency, system design, and AI application development. With over 157k stars, it also touches on agent, AI, context-engineering, DeepSeek, MCP, and other cutting-edge topics, making it suitable for developers preparing for technical interviews and learning backend integration with AI.
